name: kicad-context
description: Read-only MCP server for understanding KiCad projects
long_description: Point it at a KiCad project and an agent can answer what the board is and what's wrong with it, without loading the whole design into context. Seven read-only tools with hard output budgets. Requires KiCad 10+ and uv on the system.

uvx_path.title: Path to uvx
uvx_path.description: Absolute path to the uvx binary. Run `which uvx` in a terminal; usually /opt/homebrew/bin/uvx on macOS.
